# PHIL.185 ? Continuous Value Addition

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** value_creation
**Subcategory:** continuous_value_addition
**Domain:** VALUE_CREATION
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Keep adding value to maintain and grow relationships

## Application
Never rest on past value, innovate continuously, deepen relationships, prevent commoditization
